battle: Battle 1 - Creative Apps with GitHub Copilot
core_requirements: Demonstrate meaningful GitHub Copilot usage during development
Integrate at least one Microsoft IQ intelligence layer
Submit a creative application with unique user value and thoughtful UX
Protect confidential information and use demo data only
preferred_signals: Copilot CLI or MCP readiness if feasible
Clear documentation of how AI helped build the project
security_rules: Do not include API keys, passwords, tokens, or credentials
Do not include customer data or personally identifiable information
Do not include confidential company information
Use environment variables for sensitive configuration

war_room_alignment.creative_app: A mission control dashboard that helps builders create stronger hackathon submissions
war_room_alignment.copilot_usage: The project will include a Copilot Battle Log documenting AI assisted development decisions
war_room_alignment.foundry_iq: The workflow grounds recommendations in project profiles, rules summaries, judging criteria, risks, and artifact status
war_room_alignment.safety: The demo uses synthetic project data only and avoids private repositories or confidential materials
